title: Update module github.com/containers/buildah to v1.37.5
body:

| Package | Change | Age | Adoption | Passing | Confidence |

| [github.com/containers/buildah](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah) | `v1.37.1-0.20241018144937-2551c8f3d110` -> `v1.37.5` | [![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fbuildah/v1.37.5?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![adoption](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/adoption/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fbuildah/v1.37.5?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![passing](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/compatibility/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fbuildah/v1.37.1-0.20241018144937-2551c8f3d110/v1.37.5?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) | [![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fcontainers%2fbuildah/v1.37.1-0.20241018144937-2551c8f3d110/v1.37.5?slim=true)](https://docs.renovatebot.com/merge-confidence/) |

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>containers/buildah (github.com/containers/buildah)</summary>

### [`v1.37.5`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.37.5)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.37.4...v1.37.5)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.37.5 -->

#### What's Changed

##### Notable changes

-   \[release-1.37] Bump Buildah to v1.37.5 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat)
-   \[release-1.37] \[skip-ci] Packit: constrain koji job to fedora package to avoid dupes by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5775](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5775)
-   \[release-1.37] Properly validate cache IDs and sources  - Resolves CVE-2024-9675 by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5780](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5780)
-   \[release-1.37] Bump the containers/storage library to v1.55.1 - Resolves CVE-2024-9676 by [@​mheon](https://redirect.github.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5786](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5786)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.37.4...v1.37.5

### [`v1.37.4`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.37.4)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.37.3...v1.37.4)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at release-1.37 -->

#### What's Changed

##### Notable changes

-   \[release-1.37] Fix CVE-2024-9407 and CVE-2024-9341 by [@​Luap99](https://redirect.github.com/Luap99) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5764](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5764)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.37.3...v1.37.4

### [`v1.37.3`](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/releases/tag/v1.37.3)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.37.2...v1.37.3)

<!-- Release notes generated using configuration in .github/release.yml at v1.37.3 -->

#### What's Changed

##### Notable changes

-   \[release-1.37] Bump Buildah to v1.37.2, c/common v0.60.2, c/image v5.32.2 by [@​TomSweeneyRedHat](https://redirect.github.com/TomSweeneyRedHat) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5696](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5696)
-   \[release-1.37] Use Epoch: 2 and respect the epoch in dependencies. by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5699](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5699)
-   \[release-1.37] imagebuildah.StageExecutor: clean up volumes/volumeCache by [@​nalind](https://redirect.github.com/nalind) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5740](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5740)
-   \[release-1.37] `manifest add --artifact`: handle multiple values by [@​openshift-cherrypick-robot](https://redirect.github.com/openshift-cherrypick-robot) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5739](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5739)
-   \[skip-ci] Release 1.37 packit backports by [@​lsm5](https://redirect.github.com/lsm5) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5735](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5735)
-   \[release-1.37] Do not error on trying to write IMA xattr as rootless by [@​mheon](https://redirect.github.com/mheon) in [https://github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5746](https://redirect.github.com/containers/buildah/pull/5746)

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/containers/buildah/compare/v1.37.2...v1.37.3

### Renovate Ignore Notification
